steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, open General and go to the Facilities section.
You now see the Facilities overview.
Click the pencil (editing) icon next to the facility you want to modify.
You can now view and edit the general settings for this facility.
Check or uncheck the box next to Automatic Ticket Printing. Unchecking it stops tickets from being printed.
Click the info button if you need more details - a pop-up provides further information.
Click Save to apply the changes.
